Example: Closes #42 -->

## Mandatory checklist

Before opening this PR, confirm each item:

- [ ] An approved issue with label `approved` exists for this PR
- [ ] The note passes the actionability criterion in `vault/_meta/00_actionability_filter.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete with all mandatory fields
- [ ] The section "Why this changes how I write code" is filled with two to four concrete lines
- [ ] The note has between 2 and 6 outgoing links with explicit relationship labels
- [ ] The file name is in kebab-case without accents
- [ ] If behavior differs between Java 21 and Java 25, the note includes the version comparison section
- [ ] The commit follows Conventional Commits (`docs(scope): short description`)
- [ ] `status` is set to `draft` in frontmatter

## Note summary

<!-- One sentence: what is the concept and why is it actionable. -->
